title: Offline Lab Host Resource Baseline
description: Format of /data/config/resources.json. Written at boot by offlinelab-resources.service. Used by appctl for pre-install capacity checks. See docs/specs/resource-tracking.md.

total_memory_mb.description: Total RAM in MB from /proc/meminfo MemTotal.

total_storage_mb.description: Total size of the /data partition in MB.

baseline_memory_mb.description: Average RSS of all running processes sampled over 10 seconds at boot. Includes the base OS and all auto-start apps already installed.

baseline_cpu_percent.description: Average CPU usage sampled over 10 seconds at boot, normalised to one core (percent). Includes the base OS and all auto-start apps already installed.

measured_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the measurement was taken.
